mapper.select: select L.lecture_no, L.title, L.professor, L.capacity, L.currentEnrollment, L.credit from member M join cart C on M.member_no = C.member_no join cart_item CI on C.cart_no = CI.cart_no join lecture L on L.lecture_no = CI.lecture_no where M.email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into cart_item(cart_item_no, cart_no, lecture_no) values (seq_cart_item.nextval, (select cart_no from member M join cart C on M.member_no = C.member_no where M.email = #{email}), #{lectureNo})
mapper.delete: delete from cart_item where cart_no = (select cart_no from cart where member_no = (select member_no from member where email = #{email})) and lecture_no = #{lectureNo}
